body:
APPROVE
Clean, consistent token migration across all six target views. Gray-scale Tailwind utilities are systematically replaced with semantic tokens, sharp containers, label-caps metadata, and badge-status utilities — matching the executions/commits views as specified. No scope creep; commit is self-contained behind the `[ddx-b2ce2335]` trailer.
